name: rust-performance-skills
description: Portable Rust performance engineering skills for Codex and other coding agents.

interface.longDescription: Rust Performance Skills helps coding agents design, review, and optimize Rust systems for low latency, throughput, memory efficiency, async correctness, high-frequency trading workloads, PyO3, Wasm, Tauri desktop/mobile apps, and FFI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $rust-performance-engineering to design or review this Rust code for low latency and performance.
